title: ageratina standleyi
intro: Ageratina standleyi, also known as Hierba del Toro, is a perennial plant native to Central America and Mexico. It is a member of the mint family and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, headaches, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation and relieving pain. Herbal preparations of Ageratina standleyi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
